title: The BEST AI for 4K images. Free & fast
summary: PiD (Pixel Diffusion) is Nvidia's free and open-source AI image model for high-resolution 4K image generation. The video demonstrates PiD workflows in ComfyUI, compares it to competing models like SeedVR2, and shows integration with upscaling and text-to-image pipelines.
